bugs_found: GET /.well-known/openapi.yaml returns 404 even though /llms.txt advertises 'OpenAPI 3.1: https://flowlink.ink/.well-known/openapi.yaml'. Either ship the file or remove the line from llms.txt.
notes: MCP manifest at /.well-known/mcp.json is well-formed: has $schema, name=flowlink, version=1.0.0, vendor, servers[1], tools[6]. servers[0].transport='sse', servers[0].url='https://flowlink.ink/mcp', auth.type='bearer', auth.token_url ends in /v1/auth/siwe/verify (matches spec). auth.scopes = [invoice:read, invoice:write, pay:execute, receipt:read, compliance:check, reputation:read] and all six reconcile exactly with the 'scopes:' frontmatter field in /skills/invoice.md, /skills/pay.md, /skills/compliance.md, /skills/receipt.md, /skills/reputation.md. errors.md lists insufficient_scope (403) with per-skill scope requirements consistent with the manifest. All 6 tool.description_url values resolve 200 with non-empty bodies (5 unique URLs since create_invoice and get_invoice both point to /skills/invoice.md; sizes 2089-5001 bytes). Only defect: advertised openapi.yaml missing - BLOCKER if agents rely on llms.txt to auto-discover machine-readable spec.
